value.stringValue: Please select at least one form of PPE before you continue.

fields.name: PPE_Title
fields.fieldText:
The role you have been assigned requires Personal Protective Equipment (PPE). Blue Arrow need to ensure we send you the correct size so that you are comfortable and safe whilst at work.


Please use the drop down menu's below and select your size

value.stringValue: For some items of PPE we arrange delivery directly to you. In order to ensure that it goes to the right place please review the current address we have and amend if incorrect.

fields.name: I_confirm_that_I_am_happy_for_Blue_Arrow_to_share_my_name_and_address_with_their
fields.fieldText: Please confirm that the above address is correct and that you are happy for Blue Arrow to share your name and address with our supplier for the provision & delivery of your PPE.

fields.name: fsadsfad
fields.fieldText: In order to capture your workers sizing details please choose from the below items and then press "Send PPE Form" (any previously requested sizing's will be pre-selected).

fields.name: CurrentDetails
fields.fieldText: Current details submitted - {!Get_Candidate.PPE_Information_Sharing_Confirmation__c}

fields.name: ShoeSize
fields.fieldText: Shoe Size: {!Get_Candidate.Footwear_Size__c}

fields.name: TorsoSize2
fields.fieldText: T-Shirt Size: {!Get_Candidate.Torso_Size_PPE__c}

fields.name: TrouseSize
fields.fieldText: Trouser Size: {!Get_Candidate.Trouser_Size__c}

screens.name: Thank_you_for_submitting_your_response
screens.label: Thank you for submitting your response.

fields.name: Confirmation_of_sizing
fields.fieldText:
Success

Thank you for submitting your size details, your Blue Arrow consultant will be in touch with more details

textTemplates.name: Emailbody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName},

The role you have been assigned requires you to have Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) to ensure that you are safe whilst at work.

We need to ensure that the items we send you are the right size and get delivered to the right place.

Please click here and complete your PPE preferences.

Kind regards,

Blue Arrow
